untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of futures price vs fair value and parity levels, which are not available in the allowed indicators list. Fair value and discount-to-parity are derivatives of spot-futures basis calculations that require external data feeds (spot price, cost of carry, interest rates). Additionally, the signal requires logic to detect if we are in the last 2-3 weeks before expiration and conditional logic to either exit or roll positions, which cannot be expressed using only the allowed operators and indicators. The pivot point used as a proxy for fair value is insufficient for this specialized futures arbitrage strategy.
translation_notes: This is a specialized index arbitrage/cash-and-carry hedge signal that requires real-time futures basis monitoring and expiration calendar logic. The core conditions (futures below fair value, discount to parity, days-to-expiration, roll logic) depend on data structures and calculations not present in standard technical indicator libraries. A proper implementation would require custom basis calculators and position management logic external to a standard backtest engine.
